content: Beautiful lobby and very welcoming staff at check-in. Made us feel right at home.
The air conditioning in our room was broken and it took two days to fix. Unacceptable.
Pool area was clean and well-maintained. Kids loved the waterslide.
Found hair in the bathroom sink and stains on the sheets. Housekeeping needs improvement.
Room service was fast and the food was excellent. The burger is a must-try.
WiFi kept dropping during my video calls. Not ideal for a business trip.
The spa was phenomenal. Best massage I've had in years.
Parking garage was confusing and poorly lit. Almost hit a pillar backing out.
Breakfast buffet had great variety but the eggs were always cold.
Front desk lost our reservation and took 40 minutes to sort it out.
Loved the rooftop bar. Amazing city views and creative cocktails.
Walls are paper thin. Could hear the neighbors arguing all night.
The concierge recommended an incredible local restaurant. Great personal touch.
Elevator was out of service for three days. Had to climb 8 floors with luggage.
Bed was incredibly comfortable. Best sleep I've had on vacation.
Gym equipment was outdated and half the machines were broken.
Check-out process was seamless and they stored our bags for free.
Shower had barely any water pressure. Took forever to rinse off.
The hotel location is perfect — walking distance to everything downtown.
Minibar prices were outrageous. $12 for a small bottle of water.
